case_title: COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CENTE VS MANAGEMENT CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $876.91 FILED BY COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CENTE AS TO DEFENDANT MANAGEMENT CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MANAGEMENT CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-02-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-06-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLTF TO BRING PROOF THAT COPY OF CLAIM MAILED BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO MANAGEMENT CENTER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER DBA DIRECT MAIL CENTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANAGEMENT CENTER $876.91 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $928.91, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
